Examples.example:
let data = [ { x:0, a: 0, b:4 }, { x:1, a: 1, b:5 }, { x:2, a: 4, b:6 }, { x:3, a: 9, b:7 }, { x:4, a:16, b:8 }, ];
plot( data.graph(p->p.x, p->p.a).points(1, blue) .line(blue.dash(), "a"), data.graph(p->p.x, p->p.b).points(2, green).line(green.dash(), "b"), ).legendPos(0.2,15)
plot( graph( x->sin(x) ).line(black, "sin($x$)"), graph( x->cos(x) ).line(blue, "cos($x$)"), graph( x->tan(x) ).line(red, "tan($x$)") ).cross() .xBounds(-pi, pi) .yBounds(-2, 2)

example.name: Simulation non linear
example.desc: Simulation of a non linear system

Examples.example:
func sor(u,v) vec(u*sin(v),u*cos(v),u^2);
plot3d( sor.solid3d() .uBounds(0, 2) .vBounds(0, 2*pi) .color(black.fill(red.darker(50)), red) ).xBounds(-3, 3) .yBounds(-3, 3) .zBounds(0, 4) .addSliderTo(gui)
